note: Master list of Michigan abortion providers ('mills' in abolitionist usage). One row per physical location. The `city` field is a canonical Michigan city name and is the join key with lib/data/cities.ts — a city's landing page pulls the mills whose `city` matches its `name`. Coordinates are the Census-geocoded lat/lng, kept here so the eventual statewide mill map can render without re-geocoding at request time. `email` is `null` when the provider does not publish one (Planned Parenthood + Summit route all contact through phone/form only). `googleBusinessUrl` is optional — falls back to a maps search built from name+address when absent.

mills.name: Planned Parenthood of Michigan — Detroit Health Center
